variables.name: nbds/font/lineheight/1p1
variables.description: Unitless line-height ratio 1.1× (display tier — tightest leading for brand-character moments). Pattern B per Appendix B #73.

variables.name: nbds/font/lineheight/1p2
variables.description: Unitless line-height ratio 1.2× (heading tier — tight leading for hierarchy moments). Pattern B per Appendix B #73.

variables.name: nbds/font/lineheight/1p3
variables.description: Unitless line-height ratio 1.3× (label tier and heading/sm — between heading and body). Pattern B per Appendix B #73.

variables.name: nbds/font/lineheight/1p4
variables.description: Unitless line-height ratio 1.4× (body tier — readable leading). Pattern B per Appendix B #73.

variables.name: nbds/font/lineheight/1p5
variables.description: Unitless line-height ratio 1.5× (body tier — comfortable readable leading). Pattern B per Appendix B #73.
